overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of Vespucci Beach boardwalk in GTA V, featuring palm-lined paths, beachside markets, and various storefronts under a bright sunny sky. The camera moves steadily through the bustling pedestrian area, passing food carts, tattoo parlors, and artwork displays.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete path toward the plaza area, passing grassy lawns and palm trees

tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
well-maintained green grass area between walkway and buildings
wide concrete pedestrian path with visible expansion joints

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beachside walkway lined with tall palm trees and grassy areas. The camera moves forward along the concrete path toward a distinctive blue building with arches in the distance, characteristic of the Vespucci Beach muscle gym.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the palm-lined path into a spacious concrete plaza dominated by an American flagpole. The 'Sidewalk Market' building becomes visible on the left, and a food cart with a colorful umbrella appears in the center of the plaza as pedestrians walk through the area.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the commercial heart of the boardwalk, passing the Sidewalk Market and approaching a tattoo parlor and jewelry store on the right. The beach and ocean become visible to the left as various pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a series of artwork display boards set up on the sidewalk near the beach. The vendor stands nearby as the camera slows to observe the displays. The blue muscle beach building becomes visible again in the distance, with the ocean and beach grass prominent on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a palm-lined beachside path into the bustling commercial heart of the Vespucci Beach boardwalk. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway flanked by tall palms and grass, moving steadily toward a distinctive blue arched building in the distance. As the path opens up, the camera emerges into a spacious concrete plaza featuring a prominent American flagpole and a colorful food cart umbrella. The scene then shifts into a denser commercial area, passing the Sidewalk Market and a tattoo parlor while the ocean and sandy beach gradually reveal themselves to the left. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches a series of artwork display boards on the sidewalk, with the blue muscle beach building remaining visible in the distance against a backdrop of beach grass and open water.
